title: Enckea lata
taxonomy: Enckea lata is classified as a species within the family Enchaeaceae. This family is part of the order Arales in the class Liliopsida. The class Liliopsida is a subgroup of the larger division Magnoliophyta, which includes all flowering plants. Further classification includes the kingdom Plantae and the domain Eukaryota. Enckea lata is a rare and unique plant species found in specific regions.
uses: Enckea lata is a genus of plants in the family Burmanniaceae, but there is insufficient information available about its medicinal uses.
constituents: Enckea lata contains bioactive compounds that have shown potential in various studies. However, more research is needed to fully understand the properties and benefits of these compounds.
